title: Membership
description: The customer's paid subscription contract with the academy. NEVER confused with subscription::TenantSubscription (which is the ACADEMY's Academorix SaaS bill — a different table entirely). Belongs to Tenant (CASCADE) + Region (RESTRICT) + Branch (RESTRICT) + Athlete (RESTRICT) + MembershipPlan (RESTRICT). Optional refs: primary_guardian_id (AthleteGuardian, RESTRICT), coupon_id (Coupon, RESTRICT), tax_calculation_id (TaxCalculation, RESTRICT). NEVER carries application_id (cascades through tenant), organization_id (cascades through branch), or scope_node_id (memberships are not a config consumer). Carries frozen snapshots (price + coupon + tax) at signing — plan price changes + coupon revisions + mid-contract VAT changes never retroactively affect an existing membership.

id.description: Prefixed ULID: `mbr_<26>`. DISTINCT from tenant_subscriptions prefix — see hierarchy.md §1b for the vocabulary lock.

tenant_id.description: The academy that owns this membership (the recipient of the money, NOT the payer to Academorix).

region_id.description: Commercial + regulatory zone. Drives currency + tax calculation. Per hierarchy §14 belongs-to matrix. IMMUTABLE post-create.

athlete_id.description: The athlete the membership entitles. RESTRICT — athletes cannot be archived while active memberships reference them. IMMUTABLE post-create.

membership_plan_id.description: The plan SKU. IMMUTABLE post-create (upgrades/downgrades create a new membership row + terminate the old).

primary_guardian_id.description: The AthleteGuardian responsible for payment (usually a parent). Required when the athlete is a minor + `enforce_guardian_consent` middleware fires. Set null when the guardian relationship terminates; membership continues; admin notified to reassign.

status.description: Enum: pending / active / paused / cancelled / lapsed / refunded / expired.

state_reason.description: Free-text reason for the current state transition — e.g. 'signup', 'renewal_failed', 'admin_cancel', 'chargeback_lost', 'family_move'.

price_snapshot_cents.description: SNAPSHOT of MembershipPlan.price_cents at signing. IMMUTABLE — plan price changes never retroactively re-price existing memberships.

currency.description: ISO 4217. Frozen at signing from plan.currency.

billing_interval.description: Enum: monthly / quarterly / annual / lifetime. Frozen at signing from plan.billing_interval.

coupon_id.description: The coupon redeemed at signing. RESTRICT — coupons cannot be hard-deleted while memberships reference their redemption.

coupon_snapshot.description: SNAPSHOT of the coupon at redemption time — {code, discount_kind, percentage_off, amount_off_cents, redeemed_at, discount_amount_cents_applied}. IMMUTABLE. Coupon revisions or expiry never affect a membership that already redeemed it.

tax_calculation_id.description: The tax calculation at signing. Nullable for tax-exempt jurisdictions.

tax_calculation_snapshot.description: SNAPSHOT of the tax breakdown at signing — {jurisdiction, rate_bps, taxable_base_cents, tax_amount_cents, breakdown[]}. IMMUTABLE. Mid-contract VAT changes never retroactively re-tax existing memberships. LOAD-BEARING for tax audit.

current_period_starts_at.description: Start of the currently-billed period. Null until first activation.

current_period_ends_at.description: End of the currently-billed period. Null for lifetime memberships. Advanced by ExtendPeriodOnRenewalSucceeded hook.

next_renewal_at.description: When the next MembershipRenewal fires. Null for lifetime memberships OR cancelled memberships (which stop auto-renewing).

cancelled_at.description: When the cancellation intent was recorded. May precede the effective termination (soft cancel by-period-end).

cancellation_reason.description: Required when cancelled_at is set. Free-text customer or admin reason.

cancellation_effective_at.description: When the cancellation takes effect. Equals cancelled_at for hard cancel; equals current_period_ends_at for soft cancel.

expires_at.description: The membership's terminal timestamp — for cancelled/lapsed/expired/refunded rows. Null for active/paused. Used by ExpireMembershipJob.

consecutive_failed_renewal_count.description: Runs from 0. Increments on each failed MembershipRenewal attempt; resets to 0 on a successful renewal. When >= 3, LapseMembershipJob transitions the membership to lapsed.

lifetime_value_cents.description: Monotonic running total of paid amounts across all successful renewals. Increment-only — refunds tracked separately in the refund module; this value does not decrement on refund.

metadata.description: Growth flags + optional refund_id / chargeback_id metadata + admin notes.

indexes.name: memberships_unique_active
indexes.predicate: status IN ('pending', 'active', 'paused') AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: One active/pending/paused membership per (tenant, athlete, plan). An athlete can hold two memberships on DIFFERENT plans at the same branch, but never two on the same plan.

indexes.name: memberships_next_renewal_idx
indexes.predicate: status = 'active' AND next_renewal_at IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

indexes.name: memberships_expires_idx
indexes.predicate: status IN ('active', 'paused') AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

indexes.name: memberships_dunning_idx
indexes.predicate: consecutive_failed_renewal_count > 0 AND status = 'active' AND deleted_at IS NULL

x-invariants: One active/pending/paused membership per (tenant_id, athlete_id, membership_plan_id) via partial unique index
tenant_id + region_id + branch_id + athlete_id + membership_plan_id are IMMUTABLE post-create
price_snapshot_cents + currency + billing_interval are IMMUTABLE post-create (SNAPSHOT semantics — plan price changes never retroactively re-price)
coupon_id + coupon_snapshot are IMMUTABLE post-create (coupon revisions never re-apply)
tax_calculation_id + tax_calculation_snapshot are IMMUTABLE post-create (VAT changes never retroactively re-tax — LOAD-BEARING for tax audit)

Atomic invoice creation: Membership.creating creates an invoice::Invoice in the same DB transaction; rollback on either side aborts both — enforced by CreateInvoiceOnMembershipCreated hook + atomic_membership_invoice_creation rule

status transitions: pending → active (on invoice.paid) OR cancelled (customer bailed pre-payment); active ⇄ paused; active/paused → cancelled (soft or hard); active/paused → lapsed (via retry ladder); active → expired (post-cancellation-effective-at); refunded is a terminal cross-cut from any state — set by refund module
Hard cancel with prorated refund requires `membership_hard_cancel_prorated_refund` entitlement (Enterprise) AND plan.refund_policy IN ('prorated', 'full_within_grace')
Cross-currency memberships (currency != plan.currency at time of migration) require `membership_multi_currency` entitlement (Medium+)
consecutive_failed_renewal_count monotonically increments on MembershipRenewalFailed; resets to 0 on MembershipRenewed
lifetime_value_cents is monotonically increasing — refunds do NOT decrement it (refunds tracked separately)
